name: Tranexamic Acid
description: A powerful ingredient that helps fade persistent dark spots and melasma.
scientificSummary: A synthetic derivative of the amino acid lysine that inhibits the interaction of melanocytes and keratinocytes.
mechanismOfAction: Inhibits UV-induced plasminogen activity in keratinocytes, which in turn reduces melanin synthesis.

seo.title: Tranexamic Acid - Fading Melasma | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the effective brightening power of Tranexamic Acid for stubborn pigmentation.
